notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos grounds into a double play, shortstop Javier Sanoja to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Liam Hicks. Juan Soto out at 2nd. Mark Vientos out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Joe Mack GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joe Mack grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Mark Vientos. Owen Caissie out at 2nd. Joe Mack out at 1st.
